book.title: The Secret Treehouse
book.description: Two siblings discover a magical treehouse in the woods behind their new home.

vocabulary.meaning: a room at the top of a house

content_blocks.text: Lily and Max stared at their new house. It was enormous — much bigger than their old apartment in the city.
"I don't like it here," Max said quietly. He missed his friends. He missed the park. He missed everything about the city.

content.statement: Max was happy about moving to the new house.

content_blocks.text: Lily grabbed his hand. "Come on, let's explore! Mom said there's a huge garden in the back."
They walked through the long hallway and opened the back door. The garden was wild and overgrown. Tall grass reached up to their knees.

content.correct_answer: covered with plants that have grown too much
options: covered with plants that have grown too much

content_blocks.text: At the very end of the garden, behind the old oak trees, they saw something. A wooden ladder was nailed to the biggest tree.
"Look up!" Lily whispered. High above them, hidden among the branches, was a treehouse.

content_blocks.caption: The hidden treehouse among the branches

vocabulary.meaning: a device for looking at distant objects

content_blocks.text: Max climbed up first. The ladder was old but strong. When he reached the top, he pushed open a small wooden door.
The treehouse was bigger than he expected. There was a dusty carpet on the floor, two small chairs, and a bookshelf filled with old books.
"This is amazing!" Lily said as she climbed in behind him. She walked to the window and looked out. You could see the whole garden from up here.

content.instruction: Select all the things they found inside the treehouse:

content_blocks.text: Max picked up one of the books. The pages were yellow with age. On the first page, someone had written: "This treehouse belongs to whoever finds it."
In the corner, under a piece of cloth, there was something else — an old telescope. Max held it up to his eye and pointed it toward the sky.
"Lily, come look at this!" he said excitedly. Through the telescope, they could see birds they had never seen before.

content.instruction: Match each item with where it was found:

pairs.right: under a cloth in the corner
on the first page of a book

content_blocks.text: Max smiled for the first time since they moved. Maybe this new house wasn't so bad after all.
The next morning, Lily woke up early. She couldn't stop thinking about the treehouse. She got dressed quickly and ran outside.
Max was already there, sitting in one of the small chairs, reading the old book. "Lily, look at this," he whispered. "There's a map inside this book!"

content.statement: Lily was the first one to arrive at the treehouse that morning.

content_blocks.text: The map showed the garden with a big X marked near the stone wall. Under the X, someone had written: "Dig here for the first secret."
They found an old shovel in the corner of the garden and started digging. After ten minutes, Max's shovel hit something hard.
It was a small metal box, covered in dirt. Lily brushed it clean and carefully opened the lid.
Inside the box, there was a small golden key and a note. The note said: "This key opens the next secret. Look where the owl sleeps."
Lily and Max looked at each other with wide eyes. This was going to be the best summer ever.

book_quiz.title: The Secret Treehouse - Final Quiz
book_quiz.instructions: Answer these questions about the story.

questions.question: Why was Max unhappy at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Max missed his friends and everything about the city where they used to live.

options: He was afraid of the dark
He missed the city and his friends
content.correct_answer: He missed the city and his friends

questions.question: Complete the sentence about what they found in the treehouse:
questions.explanation: The treehouse had a dusty carpet, two small chairs, and a bookshelf filled with old books.

content.sentence: The treehouse had a dusty carpet, two small chairs, and a ___ filled with old books.

questions.question: Put these events from the story in the correct order:
questions.explanation: First they moved to the new house, then found the treehouse, then discovered the map, and finally dug up the metal box.

events: They dug up a metal box near the stone wall
Lily and Max moved to a new house
They found a map inside an old book
They discovered a treehouse in the garden

questions.question: Match each chapter with what happened in it:

right: They found the treehouse in the garden
They discovered old books and a telescope
They dug up a metal box with a golden key

questions.question: Who said each of these lines in the story?
